emails.subject: Re: error deal 531788
emails.body: Re: error deal 531788 The NYMEX calendar shows that West Option expire on 9/24 Prebon may be looking at the Futures expiry date. But it should be 9/24. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/27/2001 08:21 AM

emails.subject: error deal 531788
emails.body: error deal 531788 Matt Motley deal 531788 Prebon shows expiration as 9/25 at 2:00 p.m. Enpower has 9/24 at 2:00 p.m. Can you check with Matt. Thanks!
